gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: لم يذكره - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/354)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: لم يذكره - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/354)
text: كَمْ مِنْ مَغْرُورٍ بِمَا قَدْ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ كَمْ مِنْ مُسْتَدْرَجٍ بِسَتْرِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَ كَمْ مِنْ مَفْتُونٍ بِثَنَاءِ النَّاسِ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Suleyman Bin Dawood Al Minqary, from Hafs Bin Giyas,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘How many are proud due to what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Favoured upon him, and how many are gradually allured by the Veiling of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> upon him, and how many are infatuated by the praises of the people upon him’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from Sulayman (ibn Dawud) al-Minqari from Hafs ibn Ghiyath from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “How many are those who suffer losses due to the bounties that Allah grant them! How many are those who gradually move to destruction due to Allah’s covering their sins! How many are of the people misled due to other’s prais and applause for them!”’
